---
title: "Your instructor"

sidebar: false
repo-actions: false
page-navigation: false

listing:
  template: about.ejs
  contents:
    - name: Varada Kolhatkar
      instructor: true
      role: "Associate Professor of Teaching, Computer Science, Master of Data Science"
      image: varada.png
---

::: column-body
::: {#listing}

:::
:::
